title: Using De-MetaST-BLAST
description:
{"blocks":[{"key":"2ar95","text":"   Please contact Dr. Steven Wilhelm (wilhelm@utk.edu) or Samantha Coy (srose16@utk.edu) for additional information regarding this protocol.
  
 De-MetaST-BLAST, written in C++, is a script that can validate degenerate primers by performing in silico PCR amplification of the primers against metagenomic and metatranscriptomic databases (e.g. CAMERA; MG-RAST). The output is a list of in-silco PCR amplicons that are then blasted against GenBank to determine the most homologous sequence to the amplicon.
  
 Modified from Gulvik, C. A., Effler, T. C., Wilhelm, S. W., & Buchan, A. (2012). De-MetaST-BLAST: A Tool for the Validation of Degenerate Primer Sets and Data Mining of Publicly Available Metagenomes. PLoS ONE,7(11). doi:10.1371/journal.pone.0050362
 
 
 ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":710,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"1r95t","text":"Requirements:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7521b","text":"- Potential degenerate primers","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fana6","text":"- Linux terminal","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"eh3ka","text":"- Basic knowledge of navigating directories by command line","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"382hb","text":"- De-MetaST-BLAST program installed","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Use MEGA to perform an alignment of the gene of interest
The predicted amplicon (70-200bp for RT-qPCR) must have enough variability that sequencing these amplicons can distinguish taxonomy
Check for G4 complexes and other secondary structures that the primers may form
Check for non-specific amplification and thermal stability for PCR protocols
$ cd~/Desktop/Sam/De-MetaST-BLAST/ (or cd to wherever the program is)
Input filename for primers (press Enter to use Primers.txt) (Custom file.txt or hit enter)
<Press Enter> Opening: Primers.txt Forward Primer: CARGGNGAYACNCARCC Reverse Primer: YTTNCCRTCNCKRYCNGT
creator: Steven W Wilhelm
